MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING

Off calendar as duplicate entry.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/CEK)

Notice Of And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-26-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ABHINAV SHETTI's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement:

The motion is granted with these modifications:
" An (i) order and (ii) judgment in compliance with the rules of court (3.769) and this tentative must be emailed to the clerk of Department 611 (Judge Karnow)
" These two documents should be sent in Word-editable electronic format
" The incentive award is $5000
" The judgment must reserve jurisdiction of the court
" The order must among other things
o Recite the number of objectors and the number of opt-outs;
o State the number of class members;
o Set a date by which a final report on distribution of all funds is filed before Judge Karnow.

Proposed order and proposed judgment are received for review.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/CEK)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-25-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Noah Woods, Esq. for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ABHINAV SHETTI's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Plaintiff Abhinav Shetty's unopposed motion for preliminary approval of class action settlement is granted. The Court will adopt the proposed order granting preliminary approval of class action settlement and set a Final Approval Hearing for Friday, August 26, 2022.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/SRB)
